replies.msg: 隻左手用左邊個joint, muscle 去support 佢
淨係隻手都幾十個joint 幾十條muscle

Shoulder: Acromioclavicular joint, coracoclavicular joint, glenohumeral joint
(Sternoclavicular joint: minor supporting joint )

Elbow: humerounlar and humeroradial joint
(Not important: proximal/ distal radioulnar joint

Radiocarpal joint


Muscle: deltoid(mostly posterior part), tricep brachii, aconeus, bicep brachii (for antagonist movement), anterior forearm compartment (extension of your hand)
Anterior serratus, pectoralis minor, Teres minor, Teres major , infraspinatus, rhomboids, latissimus dorsi (功能嚟講入邊再分synergist, fixator, antagonist 不過唔係好記得）


其實真係好撚多 Ching 被professor玩鳩?
